## Issue Checklist And Scope

- [ ] I reviewed the linked Issue body, comments, labels, milestone, Project, checklist, and acceptance criteria.
- [ ] All in-scope Issue checklist items and acceptance criteria are complete.
- [ ] Out-of-scope follow-up work is captured in a PR comment or follow-up Issue instead of being silently added here.

## GitHub Metadata

- [ ] PR has the relevant Issue area/type/priority labels.
- [ ] PR is assigned to the same milestone as the linked Issue, when applicable.
- [ ] PR is added to the same GitHub Project as the linked Issue, when applicable.
- [ ] PR status is `status: needs-review` only because the linked Issue checklist and acceptance criteria are complete.
